assay_context.holding_protocol: depolarizing step protocol per source assay

extraction.method: literature value transcribed by maintainer, then machine-corroborated against the independent published CiPA reference table

corroboration.source: Ridder et al. 2020, Toxicol Appl Pharmacol 394:114961, Table 1 — Bayesian-hierarchical static hERG IC50 (ambient temp); verified vs PMC7166077.
corroboration.note: IC50 machine-corroborated against an independent published value; a human has NOT confirmed it against the source PDF, so it is pending_human_review, not verified (spec.md §9).

extraction.notes: IC50 agrees with an independent published value (see corroboration). Still awaiting human confirmation against the source PDF — pending_human_review, NOT verified (spec.md §9).
